content.fact_text: Production-ready Kafka messaging infrastructure with integrated circuit breakers, HMAC message signing, and DLQ error handling.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes Kafka producer with idempotent/all-acks configuration, consumer groups with DLQ routing, circuit breaker protection for producers, and HMAC-based message integrity verification. Handles graceful shutdown of connections on process signals.
interfaces: publish(topic: string, key: string, message: any, correlationId: string): Promise<void>
createConsumer(groupId: string, topic: string, handler: (payload: any, headers: Record<string, any>) => Promise<void>): Promise<void>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a unified, secure, and production-ready interface for Kafka event-driven operations.
